name: CerebraLLMOps-mcp
description: LLM/Agent Operational Control Layer — prompt versioning, model routing, quality evaluation, feedback loop, guardrails

name: LLMOps Prompt Versioning
description: Skill for managing prompt template lifecycle: register, version, review, promote, rollback. Enforces STD-AI-PROMPT-VERSION-001.

name: LLMOps Model Routing
description: Skill for selecting the appropriate AI model given task_type and risk_level. Uses the task_type × risk decision matrix.

name: LLMOps Quality Evaluation
description: Skill for running automated and human evaluation on agent outputs. Includes schema validation, behavioral eval suites, and regression testing.

name: LLMOps Feedback Loop
description: Skill for collecting, classifying, and routing feedback from downstream MCPs into the continuous improvement workflow.

name: Prompt Versioning Standard
description: Defines semver rules, immutability, rollback naming, and quality gate requirements for all LLM prompt templates. References STD-AI-PROMPT-VERSION-001.

name: LLMOps Agent Behavior Standard
description: Mandatory behavioral rules for all Cerebra agents: orchestrator-first, no forbidden tools, human escalation triggers, evidence-based outputs, no self-modification.

name: LLM Observability Standard
description: Mandatory fields for every managed LLM run trace: agent_id, prompt_version, model_id, input_tokens, output_tokens, cost_estimate, latency_ms, tool_calls, eval_result.

name: LLMOps High-Risk Output Review Gate
description: 12-item human review gate for critical-risk agent outputs. All 12 items must pass before the output can be acted upon.

name: LLM Guardrail Security Rules
description: Active guardrails enforced on all managed LLM runs: sensitive context scan, output schema validation, PII scrub, citation grounding, tool permission check, content filter.

name: Prompt Version Update
description: Task type for registering, reviewing, and promoting a new prompt version. Follows prompt-versioning-policy and prompt-readiness-checklist.

name: Model Routing Change
description: Task type for updating model routing policy. Requires proposal workflow, shadow mode, regression eval, and model-change-readiness-checklist.

name: Cerebra Platform Guardrail
description: Baseline input/output guardrail applied to all Cerebra LLM calls: PII masking, prompt injection detection, response-length enforcement, content-policy compliance.

name: Cerebra Core Eval Suite
description: Deterministic evaluation suite for all Cerebra prompts and models: schema compliance, behavioral invariants, regression tests, and hallucination detection.

name: claude-sonnet-4.5 (production v1)
description: Production model version for Cerebra agent tasks: claude-sonnet-4.5, temperature 0.3, max_tokens 8192, context window 200k. Governed by LLMOps guardrail and evaluated by core eval suite.

name: Cerebra Agent System Prompt v1
description: Base system prompt template for all Cerebra agent sessions: role preamble, tool-use rules, evidence requirements, escalation triggers. Managed under STD-AI-PROMPT-VERSION-001.

name: Backend Developer Agent Instruction
description: System instruction for the backend-developer agent role: service-boundary rules, DB write patterns with SET LOCAL actor_id, migration safety checklist, and evidence requirements before marking tickets done.
